about.title: About me
about.lead: Software Engineer specialized in backend development with TypeScript and mobile development with Flutter.
about.body: I'm a software engineer from Bogotá, Colombia with 3+ years of professional experience. I design and build typed, scalable backend systems and RESTful APIs (Node.js/NestJS), event-driven architectures and real-time verification flows (SSE/EventSource). I orchestrate agents and AI/ML-powered pipelines to improve detection, remediation and production reliability.
bullets: Backend: TypeScript, Node.js, NestJS, Java, Spring Boot.
Mobile: Flutter, Dart, Clean Architecture, BLoC.
Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Docker, GitHub Actions, CI/CD.
AI/ML pipelines, automated testing (Vitest, Playwright, JUnit).

meta.title: About — Nicolás Calderón
meta.description: Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience. Backend with TypeScript, mobile with Flutter, AI/ML pipelines.

summary.body: Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience, specialized in backend development with TypeScript and mobile development with Flutter. I design and build typed, scalable backend systems and RESTful APIs (Node.js/NestJS), event-driven architectures and real-time verification flows (SSE/EventSource). I orchestrate agents and AI/ML-powered pipelines—including an agent error-type detection engine and automated verification checks—to improve detection, remediation and production reliability. Also experienced with Java/Spring Boot for domain services and operational tooling using PostgreSQL, Docker and AWS.
bullets: Backend: TypeScript, Node.js, NestJS, SSE, REST APIs.
Mobile: Flutter, Dart, Clean Architecture, BLoC.
Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Docker, GitHub Actions, CI/CD.
AI/ML pipelines, automated testing (Vitest, Playwright, JUnit).

items.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built typed backend services and REST APIs for an agent-based data extraction and verification platform using TypeScript, Node.js/NestJS, SSE, and polling workflows.
Developed AI/ML-driven failure-classification and remediation flows that improved operational visibility and data reliability for scraper and portal-verification agents.
Hardened Playwright-based agents with retry and credential-update strategies, while strengthening testing, CI/CD, and observability practices across the platform.

items.title: Project Leader
bullets: Led end-to-end development of a license control platform for centralized client-license management, expiration tracking, and automated status enforcement.
Architected a SuiteCRM iframe module with real-time geolocation visibility for field supervisors and designed an offline-first mobile architecture with background synchronization.
Integrated facial recognition into authentication and coordinated backend, frontend, and product execution for critical platform initiatives.

items.title: Mobile App Developer
bullets: Contributed to the mobile app architecture and delivered responsive Flutter interfaces for private-security operations, including shifts, patrols, and supervision workflows.
Resolved critical bugs, improved field stability, and collaborated cross-functionally with product, QA, and backend teams to ship reliable mobile experiences.

items.title: Full-stack Developer
bullets: Built 15+ websites and web applications for small businesses and startups, supporting up to 500 MAU with load times under 2 seconds.
Integrated Node.js and Spring Boot APIs that improved response times by 25% and automated repetitive workflows with scripts and AI tools.
Partnered directly with 5+ clients to translate business needs into technical solutions, achieving a 90% on-time project completion rate.

items.notes: Coursework: Full-Stack Development, Database Design, Software Architecture. Capstone Project: Collaborated with CremHelado to prototype an AI tool for proposal management.
Focus Areas: Advanced Cloud Computing, Software Architecture and Design, UX/UI Design, Full-Stack Web Development and Database Design.

certs.title: Certifications
items: AWS Cloud Practitioner — Validated foundational knowledge of AWS cloud concepts, core services, security, and cost management.
React From Scratch (Udemy) — React, TypeScript, Zod, Zustand, React Query, Next.js, Tailwind, React Router, MERN/PERN.
